verification_command: python scripts/steward_audit.py && python -m pytest tests/ -q && python scripts/deep_verify.py && python scripts/check_stale_docs.py
post_milestone_tasks: /gsd:quick "Gap analysis on full test suite — find coverage holes and produce prioritized gap report"
/gsd:quick "Update CLAUDE.md v2.0+ to reflect current state: test count, layers, innovations, new CERT files"

evolution_protocol.description: Recursive self-improvement loop — protocol verifies agents who extend the protocol
after_every_phase: python scripts/check_stale_docs.py — fix any STALE files before next phase
after_every_milestone: 1. python scripts/agent_evolution.py — full system health check
3. Update CLAUDE.md — agents know current state
4. git tag vX.Y.Z + GitHub Release — triggers milestone_gap_analysis.yml
5. Update outreach contacts with new stats
evolution_protocol.governance: Every new claim: impl + dispatch + claim_index + canonical_state + 6-test suite + run check_stale_docs.py

notes.test_count: 511 — run pytest to get live count, use system_manifest.json as source of truth
notes.layers: 5 independent — Layer 1 SHA-256, Layer 2 Semantic, Layer 3 Step Chain, Layer 4 Ed25519, Layer 5 NIST Beacon
notes.next_milestone: v0.6.0 — AGENT-DRIFT-01 (claim #15), recursive self-improvement loop formalized
